text: Blessed is He in whose hand is dominion, and He is over all things competent -
tl: Tabaarakal lazee biyadihil mulku Wa-huwa 'alaa kulli shai-in qadeer

text: [He] who created death and life to test you [as to] which of you is best in deed - and He is the Exalted in Might, the Forgiving -
tl: Allazee khalaqal mawta walhayaata liyabluwakum ayyukum ahsanu 'amalaa; Wa-huwal 'azeezul ghafoor

text: [And] who created seven heavens in layers. You do not see in the creation of the Most Merciful any inconsistency. So return [your] vision [to the sky]; do you see any breaks?
tl: Allazee khalaqa sab'a samaawaatin tibaaqaa maa taraa fee khalqir rahmaani min tafaawut farji'il basara hal taraa min futoor

text: Then return [your] vision twice again. [Your] vision will return to you humbled while it is fatigued.
tl: Summar ji'il basara karrataini yanqalib ilaikal basaru khaasi'anw Wa-huwa haseer

text: And We have certainly beautified the nearest heaven with lamps [i.e., stars] and have made [from] them what is thrown at the devils and have prepared for them the punishment of the Blaze.
tl: Wa-laqad zaiyannas samaaa'ad dunyaa bimasaa-beeha Wa-ja'alnaahaa rujoomal lish-shayaateeni Wa-a'tadnaa lahum 'azaabas sa'eer

text: And for those who disbelieved in their Lord is the punishment of Hell, and wretched is the destination.
tl: Wa-lillazeena kafaroo bi-rabbihim 'azaabu jahannama Wa-bi'sal maseer

text: When they are thrown into it, they hear from it a [dreadful] inhaling while it boils up.
tl: Izaaa ulqoo feehaa sami'oo lahaa shaheeqanw Wa-hiya tafoor

text: It almost bursts with rage. Every time a company is thrown into it, its keepers ask them, \"Did there not come to you a warner?\"
tl: Takaadu tamayyazu minal ghaizz kullamaaa ulqiya feehaa fawjun sa-alahum khazanatuhaaa alam ya'tikum nazeer

text: They will say, \"Yes, a warner had come to us, but we denied and said, 'Allāh has not sent down anything. You are not but in great error.'\"
tl: Qaaloo balaa qad jaaa'anaa nazeerun fakazzabnaa Wa-qulnaa maa nazzalal laahu min shai-in in antum illaa fee dalaalin kabeer

text: And they will say, \"If only we had been listening or reasoning, we would not be among the companions of the Blaze.\"
tl: Wa-qaaloo law kunnaa nasma'u aw na'qilu maa kunnaa feee as-haabis sa'eer

text: And they will admit their sin, so [it is] alienation for the companions of the Blaze.
tl: Fa'tarafoo bizambihim fasuhqal li-as-haabis sa'eer

text: Indeed, those who fear their Lord unseen will have forgiveness and great reward.
tl: Innal lazeena yakhshawna rabbahum bilghaibi lahum maghfiratunw Wa-ajrun kabeer

text: And conceal your speech or publicize it; indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.
tl: Wa-asirroo qawlakum awij haroo bih; innahoo 'aleemum bizaatis sudoor

text: Does He who created not know, while He is the Subtle, the Aware?
tl: Alaa ya'lamu man khalaqa Wa-huwal lateeful khabeer

text: It is He who made the earth tame for you - so walk among its slopes and eat of His provision - and to Him is the resurrection.
tl: Huwal lazee ja'ala lakumul arda zaloolan famshoo fee manaakibihaa Wa-kuloo mir rizqih; Wa-ilaihin nushoor

text: Do you feel secure that He who is above would not cause the earth to swallow you and suddenly it would sway?
tl: A-amintum man fis samaaa'i ai yakhsifa bi-kumul arda fa-izaa hiya tamoor

text: Or do you feel secure that He who is above would not send against you a storm of stones? Then you would know how [severe] was My warning.
tl: Am amintum man fis samaaa'i ai yursila 'alaikum haasiba fasata'lamoona kaifa nazeer

text: And already had those before them denied, and how [terrible] was My reproach.
tl: Wa-laqad kazzabal lazeena min qablihim fakaifa kaana nakeer

text: Do they not see the birds above them with wings outspread and [sometimes] folded in? None holds them [aloft] except the Most Merciful. Indeed He is, of all things, Seeing.
tl: Awalam yaraw ilat tairi fawqahum saaaffaatinw Wa-yaqbidn; maa yumsikuhunna illaar rahmaan; innahoo bikulli shai-im baseer

text: Or who is it that could be an army for you to aid you other than the Most Merciful? The disbelievers are not but in delusion.
tl: Amman haazal lazee huwa jundul lakum yansurukum min doonir rahmaan; inil kaafiroona illaa fee ghuroor

text: Or who is it that could provide for you if He withheld His provision? But they have persisted in insolence and aversion.
tl: Amman haazal lazee yarzuqukum in amsaka rizqah; bal lajjoo fee 'utuwwinw Wa-nufoor

text: Then is one who walks fallen on his face better guided or one who walks erect on a straight path?
tl: Afamai yamshee mukibban 'alaa wajhihee ahdaaa ammany yamshee sawiyyan 'alaa siratim mustaqeem

text: Say, \"It is He who has produced you and made for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.\"
tl: Qul huwal lazee ansha-akum Wa-ja'ala lakumus sam'a wal-absaara wal-af'idata qaleelam maa tashkuroon

text: Say, \"It is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.\"
tl: Qul huwal lazee zara-akum fil ardi Wa-ilaihi tuhsharoon

text: And they say, \"When is this promise, if you should be truthful?\"
tl: Wa-yaqooloona mataa haazal wa'du in kuntum saadiqeen

text: Say, \"The knowledge is only with Allāh, and I am only a clear warner.\"
tl: Qul innamal 'ilmu 'indal laahi Wa-innamaaa ana nazeerum mubeen

text: But when they see it approaching, the faces of those who disbelieve will be distressed, and it will be said, \"This is that for which you used to call.\"
tl: Falaammaa ra-awhu zulfatan seee'at wujoohul lazeena kafaroo Wa-qeela haazal lazee kuntum bihee tadda'oon

text: Say, [O Muḥammad], \"Have you considered: whether Allāh should cause my death and those with me or have mercy upon us, who can protect the disbelievers from a painful punishment?\"
tl: Qul ara'aytum in ahlaka-niyal laahu Wa-mam ma'iya aw rahimanaa famai yujeerul kaafireena min 'azaabin aleem

text: Say, \"He is the Most Merciful; we have believed in Him, and upon Him we have relied. And you will [come to] know who it is that is in clear error.\"
tl: Qul huwar rahmaanu aamannaa bihee Wa-'alaihi tawakkalnaa fasata'lamoona man huwa fee dalaalim mubeen

text: Say, \"Have you considered: if your water was to become sunken [into the earth], then who could bring you flowing water?\"
tl: Qul ara'aytum in asbaha maaa'ukum ghawran famai ya'teekum bimaaa'im ma'een
